skills.name: Escape Artist
skills.description: Increase ability to go to the front mid-race. (Front Runner)

skills.name: Fast-Paced
skills.description: Slightly increase ability to go to the front mid-race. (Front Runner)

skills.name: Beeline Burst
skills.description: Increase velocity on a straight.

skills.name: Straightaway Adept
skills.description: Slightly increase velocity on a straight.

skills.name: Its on!
skills.description: Increase velocity when passing another runner mid-race.

skills.name: Ramp Up
skills.description: Slightly increase velocity when passing another runner mid-race.

skills.name: Rushing Gale!
skills.description: Increase acceleration on a straight.

skills.name: Straightaway Acceleration
skills.description: Slightly Increase acceleration on a straight.

skills.name: No Stopping Me!
skills.description: Increase maneuverability when the way ahead is blocked in the last spurt.

skills.name: Nimble Navigator
skills.description: Slightly increase maneuverability when the way ahead is blocked in the last spurt.

skills.name: Taking the lead
skills.description: Increase ability to go to the front early-race. (Front Runner)

skills.name: Early Lead
skills.description: Slightly increase ability to go to the front early-race. (Front Runner)

skills.name: Top Runner
skills.description: Increase ability to pass or challenge another runner early-race or mid-race. (Front Runner)

skills.name: Leader's Pride
skills.description: Slightly increase ability to pass or challenge another runner early-race or mid-race. (Front Runner)

skills.name: In Body and Mind
skills.description: Increase velocity in the last spurt.

skills.name: Homestretch Haste
skills.description: Slightly increase velocity in the last spurt.

skills.name: Groundwork
skills.description: Slightly increase acceleration after activating many skills early-race.

skills.name: Unrestrained
skills.description: Increase ability to keep the lead on the final corner. (Front Runner)

skills.name: Final Push
skills.description: Slightly increase ability to keep the lead on the final corner. (Front Runner)

skills.name: Professor of Curvature
skills.description: Increase velocity on a corner with skilled turning.

skills.name: Speed Star
skills.description: Increase ability to break out of the pack on the final corner. (Pace Chaser)

skills.name: Prepared to Pass
skills.description: Slightly increase ability to break out of the pack on the final corner. (Pace Chaser)

skills.name: Corner Adept
skills.description: Increase velocity on a corner with skilled turning.

skills.name: Fast & Furious
skills.description: Increase velocity mid-race. (Late Surger)

skills.name: Position Pilfer
skills.description: Slightly increase velocity mid-race. (Late Surger)

skills.name: Rising Dragon
skills.description: Increase velocity mid-race. (Late Surger)

skills.name: Outer Swell
skills.description: Slightly increase velocity when passing another runner on the outside on the final corner. (Late Surger)

skills.name: Corner Connoiseur
skills.description: Increase acceleration on a corner with masterful turning.

skills.name: Corner Acceleration
skills.description: Slightly increase acceleration on a corner with masterful turning.

skills.name: On Your Left!
skills.description: Increase acceleration late-race. (Late Surger)

skills.name: Slick Surge
skills.description: Slightly increase acceleration late-race. (Late Surger)

skills.name: Swinging Maestro
skills.description: Recover endurance on a corner with efficient turning.

skills.name: Corner Recovery
skills.description: Slightly recover endurance on a corner with efficient turning.

skills.name: Breath of Fresh Air
skills.description: Recover endurance on a straight.

skills.name: Straightaway Recovery
skills.description: Slightly recover endurance on a straight.

skills.name: Indomitable
skills.description: Recover endurance when passed by another runner mid-race.

skills.name: Pace Strategy
skills.description: Slightly recover endurance when passed by another runner mid-race.

skills.name: Unruffled
skills.description: Recover endurance when surrounded mid-race.

skills.name: Calm in a Crowd
skills.description: Slightly recover endurance when surrounded mid-race.

skills.name: Iron Will
skills.description: Recover endurance when the way ahead is jammed early-race or mid-race.

skills.name: Lay Low
skills.description: Slightly recover endurance when the way ahead is jammed early-race or mid-race.

skills.name: Race Planner
skills.description: Decrease fatigue mid-race. (Pace Chaser)

skills.name: Preferred Position
skills.description: Slightly decrease fatigue mid-race. (Pace Chaser)

skills.name: Calm and Collected
skills.description: Decrease fatigue upon approaching mid-race. (Pace Chaser)

skills.name: Stamina to Spare
skills.description: Slightly decrease fatigue upon approaching mid-race. (Pace Chaser)
